title: Location
description: A search area: the geographic scope the Source Finder processes. This is search INPUT (where to look), curated by a human — distinct from a lead's geography, which anchors on the organization. Static, versioned in locations/registry.yaml. Maps to the Supabase 'search_area' table.

schema_version.description: Contract version (any 1.x is accepted; current 1.1). Bump the major on breaking changes.

location_id.description: Stable slug used across inputs, state, and outputs. Example: us-tx-austin-msa.

name.description: Human-readable name. Example: Austin Metro (5-county MSA).

scope.description: Optional structured detail that bounds the location (counties, parent entity, etc.).

priority.description: Drives ordering of the work queue.

cadence.description: How often the location is re-discovered. Sets next_due in the state store.

coverage_target.description: Optional per-area override of the discovery coverage target (default 0.90 in the source-discovery skill).

tags.description: Free-form labels for filtering (e.g. texas, tier-1).

added_date.description: ISO date the location was added to the registry.
